Depends, but Erica's Enlightenments are bad. E2 is somewhat alright, but it's better to spread pears elsewhere.
I would prioritise Aigis dupes/wheels/dreamshards and dreamsparks
Yeah get Aigis copies
Astral Reign is punishing me...

That's why I thought of Erica<:pray:1356053116260454534>
Well...lack of vulnerability, cards' levels are quite low. Leave Kath's exalt for last to be honest, focus on her cards. Additionally your blade is only +7 for now, so you can't equip Alva's wheel.
You also don't have Keyflare stuff on your team
I would consider giving Tinct Life Drain and instead of her wheel, give smth with Keyflare
Like Thais wheel
If that doesn't work out, you can try Erica. Also, Castor wants Twisted Black cov. Steppen can only be an option when he is solo DPS on your team. Moreover, he needs E3 to become one.
What I really wanted was a GMurphy team, to be honest, but since I can't get Miryam, I think it's better to focus on this team to be able to finish Astral Reign to get the pulls
Castor also likes dmg amp, so I would consider either giving Friend to Tinct, or make Paradox Kath, thus allowing you to remove Friend completely
It's either Miryam or Thais. Both work.
What would the GMurphy team with Thais look like?
Gmurphy - Thais - Tulu - flex i guess but i dont know who

Would love some comp support here too; have a strong pref for Aequor realm since I find the tentacle slapping animation hilarious, but starting to struggle with content (Arc 1, near end of Ch6) and could use any guidance.

Corpo/Caecus/Goliath/Winkle

Corpo/Tulu/Goliath/Erica

Posse: Encounter in Pure White

Corposant + Ultra Turn = 3-5 Lightning Retribution in Ultra Space. Enter Ultra Space. Switch to Red Stance. Use Caecus or Erica Exalt to apply Vuln. Tulu Exalt for Temp Str and Temp Crit Rate. Goliath Exalt to gain a metric ton of Str based Tent Dmg. Then play Cards or don’t -> Use Posse reducing the cost of Lightning Retributions -> Play Cards or don’t -> Corposant Exalt to reduce Lightning Retributions again -> Spam Lightning Retributions -> End Turn. Keep in mind you can delay Ultra Turn, and also Posse to shuffle for Lightning Retributions to hold in hand for 1-2 turns before entering Ultra Turn. 

Lastly, Winkle is a defensive option with 2 cost Weakness and a Exalt to help get another Awakener to Exalt(Battery).
Thanks!

gramona isn't doing much in this team, especially since you already have thais and tawil for keyflare, you could swap her for normal ramona or aigis or faint who all offer better utility

if you're in arc 1, costco wheels (frenzy, gluttony, emerge) are better than SR wheels on your supports 99% of the time
also, run Analysis of Death or something similar on doresain instead of the pinky promise event wheel, which is trash
its only good for affinity farming, otherwise its just a dead wheel slot

Her dmg plus sacrifice stacks

what it is
Its a status you inflict either through rouse (the 2nd option of the healing node) or Ultimate
But if you rouse each time gmurphy do damage she'll inflict it, and each turn end the num of sacrifices damages the enemy
I'd recommend grabbing gmurphys wheel

Not bothering until 55 was probably referred to substats since they are unlocked only at that point. Generally you only need 1 set of a specific covenants and some need 2 sets. I don't really want to bother mentioning every single one, but Glossary has a general mention of awakeners' covenant recommendations. It has its flaws, so you might want to specify why this specific cov for a specific awakener if you aren't sure.
https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/10UVim8m1SnY9fSDKfaH4AwnPPd22zsCDDNB6SV15yO4/edit?gid=1151278197#gid=1151278197
